sections.paragraph:
ἐξακοντίζω (Eur., X. et al.) hurl out as a javelin, fig. (TGF, adespota 529 γλώσσῃ ματαίους ἐ. λόγους) w. no object expressed, perh. aim (at) or plunge (into) εἰς ἔριν 1 Cl 14:2.—DELG s.v. ἀκ-.

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

TGF TGF = Tragicorum Graecorum Fragmenta—List 5

perh. perh. = perhaps

1 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 344
